csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEditor; using UnityEditor.U2D; using UnityEngine.U2D; public class Script { public static string Main() { string r = ""; string folder = "Assets/SpriteAtlases"; var tileAtlas = new SpriteAtlas(); SpriteAtlasPackingSettings packSettings = new SpriteAtlasPackingSettings() { enableRotation = false, enableTightPacking = false, padding = 2 }; tileAtlas.SetPackingSettings(packSettings); var tilesFolder = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Object>("Assets/Textures/Tiles"); if (tilesFolder != null) { tileAtlas.Add(new Object[] { tilesFolder }); r += "TileAtlas added Tiles folder | "; } AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(tileAtlas, folder + "/TileAtlas.spriteatlas"); r += "TileAtlas created | "; var uiAtlas = new SpriteAtlas(); uiAtlas.SetPackingSettings(packSettings); var uiFolder = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Object>("Assets/Textures/UI"); if (uiFolder != null) { uiAtlas.Add(new Object[] { uiFolder }); r += "UIAtlas added UI folder | "; } AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(uiAtlas, folder + "/UIAtlas.spriteatlas"); r += "UIAtlas created | "; AssetDatabase.Refresh(); return r; } }
